structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-01-24 HOPER Program
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-01-24 16:00:05-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

NOVA is excited to announce that we have partnered with HOPER and will be able to take advantage of their Homebuyer Incentive Program. HOPER’s mission is to empower renters to become homeowners by providing the tools and guidance needed to save money, reduce debt, and build lasting financial security.  HOPER focuses on homeowner financial education, ownership sustainability and ongoing energy savings. Buyers receive impactful financial training and can earn 3.5% of home purchase price or up to $13,000. The funds from HOPER can be used against any part of the transaction including downpayment, closing costs, rate buydown, paying off debts or simply serving to replenish cash reserves for the buyer post-close. 

 

General Eligibility

*	FHA only
*	Purchase & Rate/Term refinances
*	1–4-unit properties
*	Must not already have solar
*	Property must be suitable for solar
*	Condos and Manufactured homes are ineligible

 

Live training webinars are scheduled for this upcoming Monday-Wednesday, 1/27-1/29 1:30 PM AZ each day.  

 

Calendar invites have already gone out from the Training & Development team. For convenience, here is the zoom link for the three sessions: https://zoom.us/j/94620109302

 

Please make sure to attend one of the available sessions so you fully understand the program and our HOPER representative can answer any of your questions.

 

Additional training materials will be provided next week. 

An email template is available to market to your clients and agents, please reach out to Tech Marketing (techmarketing@novahomeloans.com <mailto:techmarketing@novahomeloans.com> ) if you would like a copy.

 

Attachments

*	Marketing Collateral
*	HOPER Quick Reference Guide

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
